---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. Note if it affects Guided, Expert, or both.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about.

**Fit with the project**
Does it preserve the principles (intellectual honesty, transparency, client-side only, no
tracking)? See the [charter](https://github.com/programmerShinobi/architecture-advisor/blob/main/docs/01-discovery-and-planning/discovery-and-planning.md) and the
[evolution roadmap](https://github.com/programmerShinobi/architecture-advisor/blob/main/docs/01-discovery-and-planning/discovery-and-planning.md#15-versioning-policy--evolution-roadmap).
